name: Aleecha
recipeIngredient: 3 Fresh hot green peppers, halved to 3 peppers
2 lbs Potatoes, cut like french fries
recipeInstructions:
Aleecha is a mixed vegetable stew.
Quemam contains an ingredient not found in the US. I'd substitute dry berebere.
In a dry pan over moderate low heat, stir fry onion, garlic, and carrots for 2 minutes. Add 1/2 cup of the water and cook for 5 minutes longer. Add the oil and continue to simmer.
Add turmeric, chilies, and cabbage. Cover the pan and steam until reduced in bulk for 2 minutes. Stir well and add the quemam, tomato paste, salt, and potatoes.
Cover the pan and cook for 5 minutes. Add the remaining water and simmer for 5 more minutes to soften the potatoes and thicken the sauce slightly.
Serve at room temperature with Injeera.
